name: Tortelloni and Vegetables Stir Fry
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the tough core from the cabbage.
2. Coarsely slice the cabbage.
3. Slice the onion.
4. Cut each red and yellow bell pepper in half, remove stems and white membrane, and discard seeds.
5. Cut the green bell pepper into 1/2 inch wide strips.
6. Prepare the tortelloni according to the label instructions.
7. In an 8 quart Dutch oven or saucepot over high heat, cook the cabbage, onion, peppers, salt, basil, and black pepper in hot oil until tender crisp, stirring frequently.
8. Drain the tortelloni.
9. Toss with vegetables.
